title: kringle's PvP Pack
description: This Is An Orange Coloured Resource Pack That Is PvP Friendly! This Pack Makes Most Aesthetics Of The Game A Sweet Orange, It Also Adds Autumn Leaves.
body: This Resource Pack Is An Sweet Orange Style Pack That Makes Most Aesthetics Of The Game Look Similar To Autumn Instead, Such As, Hearts, Hunger, and The Hotbar Selection! This Pack Is Also PvP Friendly As It Makes The Tools Smaller. If Anyone Likes A Nice Sweet Orange Style/Vibe Feel Free To Use This Resource Pack!
